<!-- indicator: fig-pc-help-hlth-screen-education -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-pc-help-hlth-screen-education
#| fig-cap: 'Most Beneficial Health Screenings or Health Education Topics for Populations Served, Putnam County (n=128)'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Most Beneficial Health Screenings or Health Education Topics for Populations Served, Putnam County (n=128).'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-pc-help-hlth-screen-education", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
